use_cases: SaaS landing pages showcasing key performance metrics and credibility indicators
Dashboard home sections displaying growth statistics with visual trend representation
Marketing pages demonstrating scale through numbered achievements
Product feature sections highlighting service capabilities
Analytics platform hero sections with real-time data visualization
ai_summary: A featured section component combining a headline with a 4-column statistics grid and an area chart to display growth metrics. Designed for SaaS and analytics products to showcase credibility through numbers like projects managed, uptime, client count, and response times. Supports dark mode with responsive layout that adapts from mobile to desktop screens.
